name: maestro-orchestrator
description: A harness for precise, auditable agent workflows — compose a graph of roles, drive the CLI agents already on your machine, with typed, gated, replayable handoffs. Built on LangGraph.
author: Xateh

scripts.test: node --test test/maestro-package.test.mjs test/maestro-mcp.test.mjs test/maestro.test.mjs test/maestro-engine.test.mjs test/maestro-herdr-runner.test.mjs test/maestro-tui-app.test.mjs test/maestro-setup.test.mjs test/maestro-ollama.test.mjs test/maestro-cli-registry.test.mjs test/maestro-init.test.mjs test/maestro-cli-args.test.mjs test/maestro-secret-crypto.test.mjs test/maestro-harden.test.mjs test/maestro-secret-prompt.test.mjs test/maestro-http-ratelimit.test.mjs test/maestro-provider-availability.test.mjs test/maestro-server-config.test.mjs test/maestro-task-graph-runner.test.mjs test/maestro-runtime.test.mjs test/maestro-schemas.test.mjs test/maestro-workflow-validate.test.mjs test/maestro-regression-corpus.test.mjs test/maestro-scoring.test.mjs test/maestro-usage-parse.test.mjs test/maestro-stage-events.test.mjs test/maestro-fs-safe.test.mjs test/maestro-artifacts.test.mjs test/maestro-events-table.test.mjs test/maestro-run-manifest.test.mjs test/maestro-bounded-tail.test.mjs test/maestro-linear-writeback.test.mjs test/maestro-cli-errors.test.mjs test/maestro-provider-aliases.test.mjs test/maestro-role-loader.test.mjs test/maestro-tool-flags.test.mjs test/maestro-adapters-tools.test.mjs test/maestro-role-compose.test.mjs test/maestro-tool-threading.test.mjs test/maestro-role-source-resolution.test.mjs test/maestro-workflow-templates.test.mjs test/maestro-role-cli.test.mjs
scripts.test:enterprise: npm run test:package && npm run test:maestro && npm run test:mcp
